title: Zymo Research Direct-zol™-96 MagBead RNA Kit
author: Opentrons (verified)
description: Your OT-2 can fully automate the entire Zymo Research Direct-zol™-96 MagBead RNA Kit. Results of the Opentrons Science team's internal testing of this protocol on the OT-2 are shown below: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of samples`: Specify the number of samples this run (1-96 and divisible by 8, i.e. whole columns at a time). * `Deepwell type`: Specify which well plate will be mounted on the magnetic module. * `Reservoir Type`: Specify which reservoir will be employed. * `Starting Volume`: Specify starting volume of sample (ul). * `Elution Volume`: Specify elution volume (ul). * `Park Tips`: Specify whether to park tips or drop tips. * `Mag Deck Generation`: Specify whether GEN1 or GEN2 magnetic module will be used. * `P300 Multi Channel Pipette Mount`: Specify whether the P300 multi channel pipette will be on the left or right mount. ---
steps_raw: Your OT-2 can fully automate the entire Zymo Research Direct-zol™-96 MagBead RNA Kit. Results of the Opentrons Science team's internal testing of this protocol on the OT-2 are shown below: Explanation of complex parameters below: * `Number of samples`: Specify the number of samples this run (1-96 and divisible by 8, i.e. whole columns at a time). * `Deepwell type`: Specify which well plate will be mounted on the magnetic module. * `Reservoir Type`: Specify which reservoir will be employed. * `Starting Volume`: Specify starting volume of sample (ul). * `Elution Volume`: Specify elution volume (ul). * `Park Tips`: Specify whether to park tips or drop tips. * `Mag Deck Generation`: Specify whether GEN1 or GEN2 magnetic module will be used. * `P300 Multi Channel Pipette Mount`: Specify whether the P300 multi channel pipette will be on the left or right mount. ---
Temperature module is set to 4 C
Binding buffer is mixed to resuspend beads
Binding buffer is added to sample
Protocol is paused and user is prompted to mix for 10 minutes on heater shaker
Incubate on magnetic beads for 7 minutes
Beads are resuspended, magnetic module engaged
Samples incubate 10 minutes with occasional mixing
Elution solution added to samples and moved to temperature module
